name: iPark my car
description: Let's go shopping to the mall. But as usual, it's very crowdy, and there are very few place to park your car. Do not panic! There is still a place to park your car but you have to find it very quickly. You must avoid cars, baby carts, and pedestrians that do not always watch where they go. Please, you must avoid crushing people !!
instructions: Move your car to an empty place You must avoid other cars shopping carts or pedestrians You win when you re perfectly parked
tags: .io Games, Arcade, Boy, Cars, Driving, Parking
